name: AI-powered website security audit
description: Scrapes a target website using Firecrawl, Claude AI analyzes security headers, SSL configuration, potential vulnerabilities, and common security issues, then emails the detailed security audit report via Gmail. Adapted from n8n's WebSecScan security auditor workflow.

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for website scraping

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the audit report

targetUrl.description: URL of the website to audit (e.g., https://example.com)

recipientEmail.description: Email address to send the security audit report to

senderName.description: Sender name for the audit email

steps.name: Compile scraped website data for analysis
Build Claude prompt for security analysis
Build HTML email security audit report
Send security audit report via Gmail
